news.title:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).
news.summary:
Cement stocks, including Nuvoco, JK Cement, UltraTech, Dalmia Bharat, and Ambuja, fell 1-3% despite HSBC's positive outlook.
HSBC set price targets, with Nuvoco at ₹420 (+38.5%), Ambuja at ₹590 (+39.9%), and UltraTech at ₹13,750 (+22.7%).

news.title:
UltraTech Cement resolves Dalla Super unit acquisition dispute, issuing 1L Redeemable Preference Shares in escrow since 2017.
Arbitration awarded unit and mines to UltraTech; all related claims, liabilities discharged.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement resolves Dalla Super unit acquisition dispute, issuing 1L Redeemable Preference Shares in escrow since 2017.
Arbitration awarded unit and mines to UltraTech; all related claims, liabilities discharged.

news.title: UltraTech resolves arbitration dispute with Jaiprakash Associates over Dalla Super unit and mines.
news.summary: UltraTech resolves arbitration dispute with Jaiprakash Associates over Dalla Super unit and mines.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement faces GST order from Maharashtra's Deputy Commissioner with Rs. 289.7 cr tax demand.
Interest of Rs. 1500 cr and penalty of Rs. 29 cr imposed; company plans to contest.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement faces GST order from Maharashtra's Deputy Commissioner with Rs. 289.7 cr tax demand.
Interest of Rs. 1500 cr and penalty of Rs. 29 cr imposed; company plans to contest.

news.title:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.
news.summary:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.

news.title:
Cement stocks like UltraTech, Shree Cement, Ambuja, and Dalmia gained 3-6% before paring gains amid rising input costs.
Nomura suggests price hikes post-March to offset fuel costs; southern, eastern markets show resilience in demand trends.
news.summary:
Cement stocks like UltraTech, Shree Cement, Ambuja, and Dalmia gained 3-6% before paring gains amid rising input costs.
Nomura suggests price hikes post-March to offset fuel costs; southern, eastern markets show resilience in demand trends.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement acquires 26.2% stake in Sunsure Solarpark Seven.
The Rs. 19.2 crore investment aims to meet green energy needs and cut costs.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement acquires 26.2% stake in Sunsure Solarpark Seven.
The Rs. 19.2 crore investment aims to meet green energy needs and cut costs.

news.title:
InCred Wealth CEO highlights near-term market volatility due to geopolitical tensions but reaffirms India's strong long-term growth prospects.
Nifty 50 has declined 6.4% in six months; TCS, HDFC Bank, and UltraTech Cement underperformed amid Middle East conflict impacting sentiment.
news.summary:
InCred Wealth CEO highlights near-term market volatility due to geopolitical tensions but reaffirms India's strong long-term growth prospects.
Nifty 50 has declined 6.4% in six months; TCS, HDFC Bank, and UltraTech Cement underperformed amid Middle East conflict impacting sentiment.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang highlights defence growth with picks like HAL, BEL.
Cement margins face pressure from rising fuel costs; prefers Ambuja, UltraTech.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang highlights defence growth with picks like HAL, BEL.
Cement margins face pressure from rising fuel costs; prefers Ambuja, UltraTech.

news.title: Goldman Sachs favors Ultratech as the top pick in India's cement sector.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs favors Ultratech as the top pick in India's cement sector.

news.title:
Markets rebounded with Nifty crossing 23,350; Sensex and Nifty Bank hit daily highs.
UltraTech, M&M, Grasim, Bajaj Fin, and Eicher Motors drove the gains.
news.summary:

news.title:
Adani Group shifts focus to margins, easing rivalry with UltraTech Cement.
Ambuja Cements may delay FY28 155 mtpa target to enhance utilization and profitability.
news.summary:
Adani Group shifts focus to margins, easing rivalry with UltraTech Cement.
Ambuja Cements may delay FY28 155 mtpa target to enhance utilization and profitability.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement surged 3.3% to Rs 10,954.7 on 16 Mar 2026.
It outpaced the Cement Products sector by 2.9%, ending a 3-day losing streak.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement surged 3.3% to Rs 10,954.7 on 16 Mar 2026.
It outpaced the Cement Products sector by 2.9%, ending a 3-day losing streak.

news.title:
Cement stocks fell up to 7% due to margin concerns from rising crude oil prices.
Ramco dropped 7% to ₹1,014.6; JK 6% to ₹5,100; UltraTech 5% to ₹11,350.4; India Cements 5% to ₹362.9.
news.summary:
Cement stocks fell up to 7% due to margin concerns from rising crude oil prices.
Ramco dropped 7% to ₹1,014.6; JK 6% to ₹5,100; UltraTech 5% to ₹11,350.4; India Cements 5% to ₹362.9.

news.title:
Tata Power partners with Salesforce for clean energy transformation; UltraTech acquires 26.2% Sunsure Solarpark stake for green energy goals.
Meesho faces ₹1,499.73 crore tax demand; RailTel, RITES, and Niraj Cement secure major orders in infrastructure projects.

Meesho faces ₹1,499.73 crore tax demand; RailTel, RITES, and Niraj Cement secure major orders in infrastructure projects.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement to acquire 26.2% stake in Sunsure Solarpark for Rs 6.72 crore to meet green energy needs.
Jayant Dua appointed MD designate from April 1, 2026; UltraTech shares fell 2.6% to Rs 11,986.75 on BSE.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement to acquire 26.2% stake in Sunsure Solarpark for Rs 6.72 crore to meet green energy needs.
Jayant Dua appointed MD designate from April 1, 2026; UltraTech shares fell 2.6% to Rs 11,986.75 on BSE.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement appoints Jayant Dua as MD Designate effective January 1, 2027.
Board also approved Dua as Additional Director and Key Managerial Personnel.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement appoints Jayant Dua as MD Designate effective January 1, 2027.
Board also approved Dua as Additional Director and Key Managerial Personnel.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement acquires 26% stake in AMPIN C I Power to meet green energy needs.
The move aims to optimize costs and comply with captive power regulations.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement acquires 26% stake in AMPIN C I Power to meet green energy needs.
The move aims to optimize costs and comply with captive power regulations.

news.title:
UltraTech Cement to hold board meeting on 27th April 2026 to review FY26 financial results.
Dividend recommendations for FY26 and trading window closure from 1st April to 29th April 2026 announced.
news.summary:
UltraTech Cement to hold board meeting on 27th April 2026 to review FY26 financial results.
Dividend recommendations for FY26 and trading window closure from 1st April to 29th April 2026 announced.

Petcoke prices rose 20% post crude surge; positive outlook for UltraTech, ACC, JK Cement.
